title: Join-Path 3-argument calls incompatible with PowerShell 5.1
description: PowerShell 5.1 Join-Path only accepts 2 positional arguments (Path, ChildPath). Calls like Join-Path $a $b $c fail with 'A positional parameter cannot be found that accepts argument'. PowerShell 7 accepts unlimited path segments. All 4 CronAiAthon modules used 3-argument Join-Path calls.

fix_applied.description: Nested all 3-argument Join-Path calls into 2-argument pairs: Join-Path (Join-Path $a $b) $c. This is compatible with both PS 5.1 and PS 7.
